## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run build` and there are no compile errors.
- [ ] I ran a smoke test of the affected flow on a real Windows desktop
      (clean W10/W11 VM or your own machine).
- [ ] I checked that the user-facing feature still works after the change
      (paste the PowerShell / DevTools output below).
- [ ] I didn't commit secrets, API keys, machine paths, or anything that
      doesn't belong in an open-source repo.
